mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_TEST_APPLY.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_TEST_APPLY ( ID, TEST_APPLY_AT, USER_ID, TEST_ID, FILE_PATHS ) VALUES ( #{id}, SYSDATE, #{userId}, #{testId}, #{filePaths} )
mapper.select: SELECT A.ID, A.TEST_APPLY_AT, A.USER_ID, A.TEST_ID, T.TEST_TITLE, T.TEST_DATE, T.TEST_LOCATION FROM TBL_TEST_APPLY A JOIN TBL_TEST T ON A.TEST_ID = T.ID WHERE A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.TEST_APPLY_AT DESC
